description: Shared keyboard bindings for Clavus — single source of truth consumed by Hammerspoon (macOS) and AutoHotkey (Windows)

bindings.name: Quick Cue
bindings.description: Add a timeline cue without leaving your DAW

params.prompt_position: Position @ (blank for current/playhead, or type bar.beat like 16.1.1):

bindings.name: Cue with Track
bindings.description: Add a cue and specify which track it refers to

bindings.name: Snapshot Now
bindings.description: Take a snapshot of the current project state

bindings.name: Inject Cues as Markers
bindings.description: Write pending cues as Ableton locators/markers into the .als file

bindings.name: List Recent Cues
bindings.description: Show the most recent cues in a notification/bubble

bindings.name: Toggle TUI
bindings.description: Launch or focus the Clavus terminal UI

bindings.name: Switch Project
bindings.description: Pick a different project to work on

bindings.name: Where Am I?
bindings.description: Get Ableton's current playhead position and show recent cues near it
